code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> Initializing: App starts

    Initializing --> Loading: Load cached notifications
    Loading --> Subscribing: Cache loaded
    Loading --> Error: Load failed

    Subscribing --> Active: Subscriptions ready
    Subscribing --> Error: Subscription failed

    Active --> Active: New notification arrives
    Active --> Processing: User interaction
    Active --> Updating: Mark as read

    Processing --> Active: Interaction complete
    Updating --> Active: Update complete

    Active --> Cleanup: 30 days passed
    Cleanup --> Active: Old notifications removed

    Error --> Retrying: Retry after delay
    Retrying --> Subscribing: Retry attempt
    Retrying --> Failed: Max retries reached

    Failed --> [HealthTech_PatientRecords]: Unrecoverable error

    state Active {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> Unread
        Unread --> Read: Mark as read
        Read --> Archived: Archive
        Archived --> Deleted: Delete
        Deleted --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
    }

    note right of Active
        Notification lifecycle:
        - Arrives as Unread
        - User marks as Read
        - Auto-archived after 7 days
        - Deleted after 30 days
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个通知中心的状态图，核心是从DiagnosticEngine启动开始，经过初始化、加载缓存，最终进入Active状态。Active状态内部还要细分未读、已读、归档、删除这几个子状态。
明白，我注意到Active内部有个嵌套结构。那从Loading到Active之间，是不是需要一个中间状态？比如缓存加载完成后要先订阅消息服务？
对，加上Subscribing状态。缓存加载成功就进入Subscribing，订阅准备好才进Active。另外加载失败要走到Error状态，支持重试机制。
好的，我先把主线画出来：Initializing到Loading，Loading分两支到Subscribing和Error，Subscribing再到Active。Error那边我加上Retrying，重试成功回Subscribing，失败则进入Failed。
Active状态内部，Unread到Read是用户手动标记，Read到Archived是自动的，7天后触发。Archived到Deleted也是自动，30天后清理。删除后的数据要同步到EMR。
确认一下：Active本身也有自循环吧？新通知到达时应该停留在Active。还有用户交互时有个Processing状态，这个和Active内部的Unread/Read是并行的吗？
是的，Active自循环处理新通知。Processing是临时的，交互完成就回到Active。另外还有个Updating状态，专门处理标记已读的操作。这两个都是Active的并行行为，不是子状态。
我加上Processing和Updating，都从Active进出。另外Active层级还有个Cleanup状态，30天无操作后进入，清理旧通知再返回Active。最后Failed状态要指向PatientRecords记录不可恢复错误。
Cleanup的流向不对，应该是Active进入Cleanup，清理完成后返回Active，而不是指向Deleted。Deleted只在Archived之后触发。
已修正，Cleanup现在是从Active进入，清理旧通知后返回Active。我再加个注释说明Active内部的生命周期：未读→已读→7天自动归档→30天自动删除→同步EMR。
